# logodev-mcp

> Look up company logos and brand data via the logo.dev API.

## Getting Started

- [Home](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/index.md)
- [Installation](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/installation/index.md)
- [Configuration](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/configuration/index.md)
- [Configuration Generator](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/configuration-generator/index.md)

## Guides

- [Authentication](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/guides/authentication/index.md)

## MCP Interface

- [Tools](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/tools/index.md)
- [Prompts](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/prompts/index.md)

- [Claude Desktop](https://pvliesdonk.github.io/logodev-mcp/1.0/deployment/claude-desktop/index.md)
